news.headline: UAB Urbo bankas in Vilnius registers new Articles of Association, company code 112027077, at Konstitucijos pr.18B.
news.summary: Urbo Bank UAB, with the company code 112027077 and situated at Konstitucijos pr.18B in Vilnius, is the subject of the following news.

news.headline: Huawei highlights ICT's role in economic growth at GITEX GLOBAL 2024 with "The Digital Dividend" article.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on October 16, 2024, Huawei revealed an important piece of content titled "The Digital Dividend - ICT Maturity Fuels Economic Growth" at GITEX GLOBAL 2024. This article highlights the crucial role ICT maturity plays in boosting economic growth by showcasing the interconnectedness between our physical and digital realms.

news.headline: Huawei debuts industrial transformation solutions at GITEX GLOBAL 2024, themed Accelerate Digitalization.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, on October 16, 2024, a major technology company served as a Diamond Sponsor for the GITEX GLOBAL 2024 event. Huawei showcased its support for industrial digitalization and intelligence with the theme "Accelerate Industrial Digitalization and Intelligence." The company organized the Industrial Digital and Intelligent Transformation Summit and introduced collaborative solutions as part of its participation.

news.headline: KPMG Australia is the first globally certified with BSI's AI management system, ensuring safe and responsible AI use.
news.summary: In London on October 16, 2024, KPMG Australia made history by becoming the world's first organization to receive certification from BSI for a globally recognized standard focused on ensuring safe AI management. This certification is designed to promote trust and facilitate the secure and responsible deployment of AI technologies.

news.headline: Iran's Atomic Organisation Chief: There is no change to the nuclear doctrine.
GITEX Editions debuts in Dubai with deeptech discussions around AI with founders and CEOs. October 16, 2024.
news.summary: Industry pioneers, executives, and top professionals in deeptech convened at the Dubai World Trade Centre for an exclusive event showcasing cutting-edge technologies. The event, which took place on October 16, 2024 in Dubai, UAE, brought together CEOs and leaders for insightful discussions focused on AI. The GITEX Editions introduced a premier platform for thought-provoking dialogues, setting the stage for future collaborations. This event marked the beginning of GITEX, promising an exciting lineup of events and discussions in the field of AI.

news.headline: Akastor ASA will present Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 30, 2024, at 15:00 CET. CEO Karl Erik Kjelstad to present.
news.summary: Norwegian company Akastor ASA has announced a webcast presentation of its third quarter 2024 financial results scheduled for Wednesday, October 30, 2024, at 15:00 CET. The event will feature CEO Karl Erik Kjelstad as the main presenter and is open to investors and analysts.

news.headline: 136th Canton Fair opens in Guangzhou on Oct 15 with 3,000+ participating, spanning Oct 15-Nov 4. #LeadingMarket
news.summary: On October 15, 2024, the Canton Fair, also known as the China Import and Export Fair, commenced its 136th session in Guangzhou. Running until November 4, the event is divided into three phases and boasts more than 3,000 participating exhibitors.

news.headline: AMSilk partners with Ajinomoto for industrial fermentation of spider silk-based proteins.
news.summary: Neuried, Germany - On October 16, 2024, AMSilk GmbH, a leading company in innovative biomaterials derived from spider silk proteins, revealed a new partnership with Ajinomoto Foods Europe. Ajinomoto, boasting more than 50 years of industrial expertise, joins forces with AMSilk to enhance their collaborative efforts. This collaboration aims to leverage AMSilk's cutting-edge technology and Ajinomoto's extensive experience to develop groundbreaking products. This alliance represents a strategic move for both companies to tap into new opportunities in the biomaterials market.

news.headline: Biocomposites invests in InfectoTest's InfectoSynovia, a point-of-care test for PJI, offering diagnosis in under five minutes using electrochemical analysis.
news.summary: InfectoSynovia is in the process of creation to offer a rapid bedside test with a high level of accuracy, capable of diagnosing Periprosthetic Joint Infection (PJI) in under five minutes. This innovative technology relies on InfectoTest's unique approach to identifying infections in minuscule amounts of synovial fluid through an electrochemical analysis technique. The development of InfectoSynovia has attracted significant investment to further propel its advancement in the medical field.

news.headline: Tata Elxsi launches Coalesce, an XR platform powered by Snapdragon Spaces for digital twins & 3D collaboration.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Tata Elxsi, a prominent global design and technology services firm, unveiled the introduction of Coalesce utilizing the Snapdragon Spaces™ XR Platform in collaboration with Qualcomm. The partnership aims to leverage the advanced capabilities of the platform to enhance XR experiences.

news.headline: Australian Firefighters Calendar 2025 launches in Europe, marking its 32nd year with fans in 90+countries.
news.summary: In Gold Coast, Australia, on October 16, 2024, the 32nd edition of the renowned Australian Firefighters Calendar for 2025 has been released. This calendar, which has a widespread global appeal, is beloved by fans in more than 90 countries. Each annual release of the calendar continues to captivate audiences worldwide.

news.headline: Sony acquires KinaTrax, Inc., new in player performance; expands into biomechanics. Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: Sony Corporation has announced its expansion into the biomechanics and player performance sector with the acquisition of KinaTrax, Inc. This move, made on October 16, 2024, marks Sony's strategic entrance into this field. KinaTrax, known for its expertise in markerless motion technology, will be a key addition to Sony's portfolio. This development signifies Sony's commitment to advancing technology and performance analysis in sports, highlighting its dedication to innovation.

news.headline: Telix presented 13 abstracts at EANM Congress, showcasing their theranostic development and MedTech.
news.summary: Today, in Melbourne, Australia on October 16, 2024, Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited (ASX: TLX) has revealed the inclusion of thirteen abstract presentations highlighting the company's advancements in theranostic development, medical technologies (MedTech), as well as research and innovation (R&I).

news.headline: Lionpoint Group rebrands to Alpha Alternatives, part of Alpha Financial Markets Consulting Group, leading alternative investments consultancy since 2003.
news.summary: In New York, Lionpoint Group, a prominent consultancy within the alternative investments sector and part of the Alpha Financial Markets Consulting Group, has unveiled its new identity as Alpha Alternatives. Alpha, established in 2003, is a renowned provider of management and technology consulting services for the financial services industry worldwide. The rebranding decision follows Alpha's acquisition of Lionpoint in 2021 and signifies Alpha's continued dedication to serving the sector.

news.headline: Synaptics introduces Veros™ with wireless SoCs for IoT, blending high-performance Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, Zigbee/Thread, and AI for seamless connectivity.
news.summary: By integrating cutting-edge wireless technology and scalable artificial intelligence, a company has achieved a significant milestone in providing seamless connectivity for context-aware IoT Edge devices. This breakthrough combines superior leadership and innovation in wireless performance and interoperability, ensuring robust and reliable communication. The integration of scalable AI enhances the efficiency and effectiveness of connecting IoT Edge devices, promising a more dynamic and responsive network. This advancement sets a new standard for connectivity, with an emphasis on adaptability and intelligence.

news.headline: Enhanced cooling period for lead trader portfolios in Binance Futures Copy Trading boosts risk control measures.
news.summary: Binance has introduced a new cooling period for lead trader portfolios in its Futures Copy Trading service to improve risk management. The upgraded feature is designed to maximize risk control measures and ensure the security of user portfolios. This enhancement will benefit users by providing a safer trading experience.

news.headline: Allianz urges for improved safety for pedestrians and cyclists in cities. Calls for better protection due to high road deaths in Europe.
news.summary: In Munich, during the 12th Allianz Motor Day event, Allianz emphasized the need for enhanced safety measures for pedestrians and cyclists in urban areas and presented specific requests to political entities, car makers, and fleet managers. Klaus-Peter Roehler, a Board member of Allianz SE, highlighted the urgent necessity for better protection as the road fatalities in Europe remain high. The call was made at the Allianz Center for Technology (AZT) in Ismaning. Roehler stressed the importance of improved safety features, particularly for vans and trucks, to address the rising number of casualties.

news.headline: Swift launching AI-powered fraud defense for global payments from Jan 2025 after successful pilot; collaboration with banks.
news.summary: A new AI-enhanced fraud detection system is being introduced by Swift to bolster the global payments industry against advanced threats. Set to launch in January 2025, this service follows collaborative efforts with banks worldwide and a successful trial in the previous year. Enhancing their existing Payment Controls Service utilized by numerous small and medium-sized financial institutions, Swift's new offering aims to combat increasingly sophisticated bad actors in the industry.

news.headline: Clearspeed partners with RSA Insurance for AI-powered fraud detection, providing voice analytics solution to enhance claims process and customer experience.
news.summary: Clearspeed, a prominent provider of AI-driven risk assessment technology for businesses, has unveiled a collaboration with RSA Insurance in San Diego and London. The partnership involves Clearspeed offering its innovative voice analytics solution to enhance fraud detection capabilities. This move aims to streamline the claims process, leading to better customer service. As instances of opportunistic and AI-enhanced fraud continue to rise significantly, alongside growing demands for quicker and easier claims resolution, this collaboration is expected to play a crucial role in addressing these challenges.

news.headline: CPI Card Group Inc. is set to deploy a new chip technology with Infineon's SECORA Pay Green for contactless cards.
news.summary: A payments technology company, CPI Card Group Inc. (Nasdaq: PMTS) based in Littleton, Colorado, is set to introduce a new contactless card technology. The company offers various card solutions and digital tools, including instant issuance through Software-as-a-Service. They are now developing a contactless card using Infineon's SECORA Pay Green technology. CPI initiated the production of sample cards in September and is prepared to move forward with mass production.

NVIDIA, Lenovo CEOs reveal AI platform at Lenovo Tech World 2024 to boost enterprise productivity. #AI #innovation
news.summary: At the recent Lenovo Tech World 2024 event, NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang and Lenovo CEO Yuanqing Yang revealed a cutting-edge AI platform set to revolutionize enterprise productivity. This collaboration promises to bring a new wave of advanced AI solutions to the market, aiming to enhance efficiency and drive innovation across industries. The platform is geared towards enabling businesses to capitalize on the power of artificial intelligence, with a focus on increasing productivity and achieving strategic business goals. This joint effort between the two tech giants signals a significant development in the tech industry, with the potential to reshape the landscape of enterprise operations. Stay tuned for further updates on this groundbreaking partnership.

news.headline: Create a decentralized voting Dapp with zkEVM. Learn about smart contract deployment and secure, transparent voting.
news.summary: Discover how to create a decentralized voting application utilizing Linea's zkEVM technology. Gain insights into deploying smart contracts, integrating frontend components, and guaranteeing secure and transparent voting processes. Dive deeper into the journey of constructing a voting platform that enhances credibility and privacy. Explore further for a comprehensive understanding of this innovative approach.

news.headline: Involves buying or selling of company shares by executives and family, often for  financial gain.
Abbott Laboratories set to release Q3 earnings, expected to report $1.2 EPS and $10.55B revenue. Stock fell 0.6% to $116.05.
news.summary: Abbott Laboratories (NYSE: ABT) is set to reveal its third-quarter earnings before the market opens on Wednesday, Oct. 16. Analysts are predicting earnings of $1.20 per share, a slight increase from $1.14 per share in the same period last year. The company is expected to report revenue of $10.55 billion for the quarter. The board of directors announced a quarterly dividend of 55 cents per share on Sept. 19. On Tuesday, Abbott's shares closed at $116.05, down 0.6%. For more analyst ratings and updates, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.

news.headline: LVMH, a top luxury brand, faces challenges amid downturn in the industry.

Chipmakers like Nvidia, AMD, ASML dragged Nasdaq down. Fear index shifted to 'Greed' zone. Dow Jones fell 300+ points. ASML shares dropped 16%, NVDA fell 4.7%, AMD dipped 5.2%. UNH shares declined 8%.
news.summary: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicated a decline in market sentiment, entering the "Greed" zone on Tuesday. U.S. stocks saw a downturn, with the Dow Jones index dropping over 300 points. ASML Holding N.V. (NASDAQ:ASML) experienced a significant 16% decrease in share value due to a technical error revealing its third-quarter earnings prematurely. NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) and Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMD) also faced declines of 4.7% and 5.2% respectively. UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) shares plummeted by over 8% following the release of its third-quarter financial results. For more details, refer to the Benzinga.com platform.

news.headline: Iranian authorities working on controlling an oil spill 4 miles off Kharg Island - IRNA
AI sector rebounds after ASML setback, market summary in just 3 minutes.
GXO to handle transport for Matalan, with 550 weekly deliveries to 200+ stores in UK&I, as strategic partner.
news.summary: GXO has been selected as Matalan's key transport partner, managing more than 550 deliveries every week to more than 200 Matalan stores throughout the UK and Ireland.

news.headline: Reykjavík Energy is holding a green bond auction on October 22, 2024 for OR280845 GB, OR180255 GB, and OR031033 GB.
news.summary: Reykjavík Energy, also known as Orkuveita Reykjavíkur or Orkuveitan, has scheduled a bond auction for Tuesday, October 22nd, 2024. The auction will include bonds from the green bond classes OR280845 GB, OR180255 GB, and OR031033 GB.

news.headline: Virtune partners with Polkadot to promote Virtune Staked Polkadot ETP in the Nordics; growing presence and transparency.
news.summary: On October 16th, 2024, Virtune, a Swedish digital asset manager and issuer of crypto exchange-traded products (ETPs), revealed a partnership with the Polkadot Network, endorsed by the Polkadot OpenGov Decentralized Treasury. The collaboration's primary goal is to showcase the Virtune Staked Polkadot ETP across the Nordics. Virtune, known for its educational efforts, regulatory compliance, and transparency, has experienced rapid growth in the Nordic region.

news.headline: Probiotics industry anticipated to reach $105.7 billion by 2029 with 8.2% CAGR due to consumer awareness and tech advancements.
news.summary: The probiotics market is set for significant growth due to factors like increasing consumer awareness, technological advancements, and a higher demand for functional foods. The market size is expected to increase from USD 71.2 billion in 2024 to USD 105.7 billion by 2029, marking a CAGR of 8.2%. This growth is fueled by a surge in consumer interest in preventive healthcare, with probiotics being seen as a natural way to enhance gut health. Technological innovations such as microencapsulation are driving market expansion by improving product stability and allowing probiotics to be incorporated into a wider range of food and beverage applications. The rise in digestive disorders like IBS and IBD is also contributing to market growth as people seek natural remedies. The human segment of the market is experiencing significant growth due to increased awareness of gut health and the development of personalized formulations targeting specific health concerns.

news.headline: Iran tells UN it is ready to respond firmly if attacked by Israel - Sky News Arabia
Deaton criticizes Warren in 1st debate for MA Senate seat, accusing her of forming an "anti-crypto army." #elections #crypto #politics
news.summary: During their initial debate, Republican candidate John Deaton criticized Senator Elizabeth Warren for creating a group against cryptocurrency, claiming she formed an "anti-crypto army." Deaton is seeking a Massachusetts US Senate position to challenge Warren.

news.headline: Bitcoin whale shifts $630K to Kraken, $5.5M total in 2 months, moving a significant sum to the exchange recently.
news.summary: Following a recent transfer of $630,000, the prominent Bitcoin investor has now moved a total of $5.47 million worth of Bitcoin to the Kraken exchange over the past sixty days.

news.headline: JP Morgan Asset Management: We see a good chance of a soft landing for the US economy.
Atlanta Fed President Bostic predicts just one more rate cut this year, 25 basis points opposed to the median of 50.
news.summary: Atlanta Federal Reserve President Raphael Bostic recently shared his forecast for the year, predicting only one more interest rate cut. At an event in Atlanta, Bostic stated that he expects a 25 basis points reduction in interest rates for the remainder of the year. This contrasts with the median projection of a 50 basis points decrease, as reported by Reuters. Bostic noted, "The median projection was for an additional 50 basis points cut, on top of the 50 basis points in September. My projection is for a 25 basis points cut." This deviation in forecasts comes as a notable update from the Federal Reserve.

news.headline: Nasdaq dropped 1% as chipmaker stocks plummet, CNN's Fear & Greed index shifted to 'Greed' zone, Dow fell over 300 points.
news.summary: The market sentiment, as per the CNN Money Fear and Greed index, saw a decrease as it shifted to the “Greed” zone on Tuesday. U.S. stocks experienced a decline, with the Dow Jones index dropping by over 300 points in the trading session. ASML Holding N.V. (NASDAQ:ASML) witnessed a significant decrease of more than 16% in its shares due to a technical glitch that led to the premature disclosure of its third-quarter earnings, originally planned for Wednesday. NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) also faced a downturn with a 4.7% decline, while Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMD) saw a 5.2% decrease during the same session. UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) encountered an 8% drop in its shares as it released its third-quarter financial results on Tuesday. For further details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Valmet to release Interim Review for Jan - Sep 2024 on Oct 30, 2024 at 2:00pm EEST. Press release on Oct 16 at 9:30am.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Valmet Oyj announced that their Interim Review for the period of January to September 2024 will be released on October 30, 2024, around 2:00 p.m. Finnish time. This update will be made public in ESPOO, Finland, at 9:30 a.m. EEST. The report is highly anticipated by investors and analysts as it will provide insights into the company's financial performance in 2024. Stay tuned for further details about Valmet's stock exchange release.

news.headline: Documentary "UNTAPPED" featuring CEOs from GM, JPMorganChase, Walmart now on Netflix in the US - encourages inclusive talent strategies.
news.summary: Leading figures such as Mark Cuban, together with CEOs from GM, JPMorgan Chase, and Walmart, are part of the initiative known as UNTAPPED, aimed at urging Corporate America to embrace inclusive talent strategies. Recently unveiled by Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY) in Pleasanton, California on Oct. 16, 2024, the documentary "UNTAPPED: Closing America's..." features prominent personalities advocating for diversity and inclusion in the workforce. This effort encourages corporations to adopt practices that promote a diverse workforce, highlighting the importance of inclusivity in the corporate world.

news.headline: Currency Strength Chart (Strongest to Weakest): USD, CAD, JPY, CHF, EUR, AUD, NZD, GBP
IQM to deliver two quantum computers for EuroHPC JU with 54 and 150 qubits. Delivery by 2026.
news.summary: In Munich, the EuroHPC Joint Undertaking (EuroHPC JU) has finalized a deal with IQM Quantum Computers (IQM), a renowned company in the development and distribution of superconducting quantum computers. The agreement entails the delivery of two cutting-edge Radiance quantum systems. The first system, consisting of 54 qubits, is scheduled to be completed in the latter part of 2025, while the second system, boasting 150 qubits, is expected to be finished by the conclusion of 2026. These two unique systems, known for their superior qubits and top-of-the-line fidelities, will play a crucial role in advancing quantum computing technology.

news.headline: Tide and Adyen join forces to offer small businesses Tap to Pay on iPhone for in-person contactless payments.
news.summary: Tide, a prominent business financial platform in the UK, has teamed up with Adyen, a global fintech platform, to allow small businesses to accept contactless payments in person through their iPhone using the Tide iOS app. The partnership aims to provide all new and current Tide merchants with an iPhone the capability to utilize Tap to Pay on iPhone. This feature enables members to easily receive contactless payments from customers without the need for additional hardware.

news.headline: Saviynt announces Converge Global Tour 2024 event in Paris on 17th October, focusing on identity security and new platform features.
news.summary: Paris - Saviynt, a prominent company offering cloud-native identity and governance platform solutions, is thrilled to introduce its Converge Global Tour 2024 event in Paris. Taking place on October 17th, this event will bring together Saviynt executives, customers, partners, and industry analysts to delve into the realm of identity security, upcoming trends, and best practices. Participants will have the opportunity to explore Saviynt's unified platform, The Identity Cloud, which includes the recently launched Saviynt Intelligence Suite.
